sglang.title: [PP] fix wrong weight logic for tie_word_embeddings model
sglang.author: XucSh
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
see #15843
This PR fixes a bug where models with tie_word_embeddings=True (e.g., Qwen3-4B) output garbage text (random characters) when running with Pipeline Parallelism (e.g., PP=2).
In Pipeline Parallelism, the Last Rank is responsible for the lm_head. For models with tied embeddings, l

sglang.title: fix(quantization): add sgl_kernel fallback for FP4 quantize on Blackwell GPUs
sglang.author: MikkoParkkola
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Bug: On Blackwell (SM 12.x), is_sm120_supported() returns True, so modelopt_quant.py only tries from flashinfer import fp4_quantize. If flashinfer is not installed, ImportError falls through to fp4_quantize = None — completely skipping the sgl_kernel.scaled_fp4_quant fallback which IS avail

Motivation
The ConsistentHashRing::get_owners method is called frequently during rate-limit checks. The previous implementation allocated a new HashSet and cloned multiple Strings for every lookup. In high-throughput scenarios, these transient heap allocations caused significant memory churn and inc

sglang.title: [model-gateway] Optimize HashRing construction to reduce heap allocations
sglang.author: ppraneth
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The HashRing::new method in src/core/worker_registry.rs previously performed $N \times 150$ heap allocations using the format! macro to generate virtual node keys. For a cluster with 1,000 workers, this resulted in 150,000 temporary string allocations during a single registry update, lead

Purpose

vllm.title: [Metrics][MFU] Fix UnembedMetrics FLOP overcounting for prefill (#33045)
vllm.author: omkhalil
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
Fix UnembedMetrics to correctly count FLOPs for the unembedding (LM head) layer.
The bug: UnembedMetrics used total_num_tokens() which counts all tokens in the
batch for projection flops, vocab projections are run on just the last token for the autoregressive use case.

This improves the modularity and maintainability

vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This was a small oversight in #30739.
We need to assign the unique engine ids used for P/D transfers before the dp size / rank is reset to 1/0 within each DP engine core process (for dense models only).
Thanks to @NickLucche for raising this!
